title: Device Home Screen - End-of-Life Support After End Life Date
scenario: End-of-life device shows red "i" icon on Device Home Screen with "Support for this device is no longer available" pop-up
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Ensure a connected device has passed its End of Life (EOL) date.
4. Observe the top right corner of the Device Home screen for a red "i" icon.
7. Tap outside the pop-up area to dismiss it.
expected: A pop-up message appears stating: \"Support for this device is no longer available.\" Tapping outside the pop-up dismisses it.
